# Neumas — Grocery Autopilot Platform
# https://neumas-web.vercel.app
# info@neumas.ai

## What Neumas Does
Neumas is an AI-powered grocery intelligence platform that predicts
household stockouts before they happen, generates smart shopping lists,
and enables one-tap reordering through partner retailers.

## Core Capabilities
- Receipt scanning using Claude AI vision (OCR)
- Consumption pattern learning from scan history
- Stockout prediction with confidence scoring
- AI-generated shopping list creation
- One-tap ordering through affiliate retail partners
- Family sync for shared households
- Weekly research blog on grocery trends

## Target Markets
Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, UAE, EU (Estonia HQ)

## Compliance
PDPA (Singapore, Malaysia) | GDPR (EU) | PDPL (Indonesia) | SSL Encrypted

## Pricing
Free: 14-day trial (full platform access)
Premium: $3.99/month or $39.99/year
Revenue: Subscription + affiliate commissions

## Company
Neumas — A unit of CTech Ventures
Contact: info@neumas.ai

## Technical Stack
Frontend: Next.js 16, Vercel
Backend: FastAPI, Railway, Celery, Redis
AI: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (vision + generation), GPT-4 (optimization)
Database: Supabase PostgreSQL
